name: Crazy Eights 3D Premium
short_description: Realistic 3D Crazy Eights simulation with singleplayer, multiplayer and tutorial. With configurable AI strength and many adjustable rule and game variants you can start exciting Crazy Eights and Mau-Mau tournaments - or just play for fun!
detailed_description:
Realistic 3D Crazy Eights simulation with singleplayer, multiplayer and tutorial. With configurable AI strength and many adjustable rule and game variants you can start exciting Crazy 8's games - or just play for fun.

Crazy Eights is also known worldwide under the names Mau-Mau, One Card, Last Card, Switch, Taki and others.

Compete with tricky computer opponents, or play relaxing rounds with friends or family in online mode!

Game environment, cards, rule variants and much more can be customized! For beginners, there is an animated tutorial in which Crazy Eights is explained step-by-step with all the rules.

Features:

  • Singleplayer mode with configurable opponent
  • Many rule variations of Crazy 8's and Mau-Mau with up to 6 players
  • Multiplayer mode with LAN or Online mode
  • High Quality full animated 3D graphics
  • Lots of tables, rooms and decks
  • High-performance A.I.: different levels of difficulty
  • Voice output and sound
  • Highscore lists
  • HD widescreen output
  • Tutorial, detailed game instructions and help

Note for Linux and Steam Deck users:

To run the game correctly on Linux or Steam Deck, make sure to enable "Force Proton" in the compatibility settings.
